text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I bring Winning Ticket to the infirmary to get her
injury looked at...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uuuugh... I'm... I'm done for...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The doctor said that even if I use my full power,
this injury won't heal overnight...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Waaaah! This is the worst! I just wanna get back
to trainiiing...
choice_data_list:
Let's not rush it. You need to take time to
recover.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Waaaah! This is the worst! I just wanna get back
to trainiiing...
choice_data_list:
Let's not rush it. You need to take time to
recover.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Take my time to recover? But then I'll have less time to practice!
choice_data_list: Healing your injury is more important.
Healing your injury is more important.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow! I-is that... how much you care about me?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: T-trainer... Thank you s-so much...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I can't believe this... You're supporting me so hard with your all-out kindness...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But even with all that power, this injury won't go
away! Waaaahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I manage to calm her down, Winning Ticket
agrees to take enough time to recover.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Go beyond the limits of my full power?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Yeah... That's it! If I can't recover with my regular all-out power...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I've just gotta find some kinda new, super... ultra
all-out strength! And then I'll be okay!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But how am I supposed to find it? Hmmm...
Hrrrngh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I know! I need to get tons of nutrition! I'll go
buy some food from the academy store!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Forgetting all about her injury, Winning Ticket
prepares to run off, but I hastily stop her and
offer to buy the food myself.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I think... I ate too much. I'm about to
explode... Uugh...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No, I gotta hold on! I need my new, ultra full
power to—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Slump...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Winning Ticket is out for the count,
and ends up having to stay in the infirmary a
while longer.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Phew! That hit the spot!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm so full! I feel revived! New, ultra all-out
strength achieved!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Trainer! I'm sure my injury will heal in no
time now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is back to her usual energetic self
and seems fired up to make a comeback.
